description: Style NoteRevel in the comfort of leather and look stylish in ease in this pair of ballet flats from enroute. Pair it with ethno-western clothes for a fab-yet-comfy look. This pair comes with a shoe bag to help you pack when you travel.Product DetailsPurple and blue slip-on with leather upper and fabric bowPadded footbed with printUpper stitched to the outsole for durabilityDurable rubber outsole grooved on the forefoot with a textured PU heel patchMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
